escalation_policies.name: Repeated Unresolved Issues
escalation_policies.description: When a customer has contacted support 3 or more times and the issue remains unresolved, escalate to Senior Support team for dedicated attention.

escalation_policies.name: Security and Fraud Issues
escalation_policies.description: Any mention of fraud, unauthorized access, or security concerns must be immediately escalated to the Security Team.

escalation_policies.name: High-Value Refund Requests
escalation_policies.description: Refund requests exceeding $500 require Financial Team approval and oversight.

escalation_policies.name: Explicit Escalation Request
escalation_policies.description: When a customer explicitly requests to speak with a manager or supervisor, honor their request.

escalation_policies.name: Legal Threats
escalation_policies.description: Any threats of legal action must be immediately routed to the Legal Team.

escalation_policies.name: Complex Technical Issues
escalation_policies.description: Persistent technical issues causing customer frustration should be escalated to specialized Technical Support.

escalation_policies.name: Account Cancellation
escalation_policies.description: Account cancellation requests should be routed to the Retention Team for possible resolution.

escalation_policies.name: Simple Inquiries - No Escalation
escalation_policies.description: Simple order tracking inquiries can be handled by automated systems without escalation.

escalation_policies.name: Payment Issues
escalation_policies.description: Payment and billing issues should be escalated if the customer has contacted more than once or the issue is complex.

escalation_policies.name: Data Privacy Requests
escalation_policies.description: Data privacy and GDPR-related requests must be handled by the Privacy Team to ensure compliance.

default_policy.name: Default - Human Review

condition.description: Catch-all for cases that don't match any specific policy

default_policy.description: When no clear policy matches or confidence is low, route to human review.
